case_title: BALLYHALLINAN FAMILY LP VS. DEMITRIO SILVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SILVA, DEMETRIO ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR AUG-12-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALLYHALLINAN FAMILY LP SERVED APR-07-2015, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

AMENDED REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT SILVA, DEMETRIO
NOTICE TO COURT OF IMPROVED FINANCIAL SITUATION OR SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SILVA, DEMETRIO

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-12-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DEMETRIO SILVA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. ATTY. ZEENAT HASSAN APPEARED FOR APPLICANT. THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. DEFENDANT FILED A NOTICE OF IMPROVED FINANCIAL SITUATION. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE BASED ON THE INFORMATION SUBMITTED ON THE APPLICATION. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, DEMETRIO
